title: Midtrans payment integration (Snap, VA, e-wallets, QRIS, webhook, idempotency)
description: Midtrans Snap checkout supporting cards, bank transfer (VA), e-wallets (GoPay/OVO/ShopeePay), and QRIS, behind a PaymentProvider interface; signature-verified webhook handler; payment status tracking; idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges.

inScope: Support for credit/debit cards, bank transfer (VA), e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, ShopeePay), QRIS
PaymentProvider interface abstracting Midtrans (swappable for Stripe/Xendit later)
Webhook handler with signature verification before updating order status
Payment status tracking (pending, paid, failed, expired)
Idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges
outOfScope: Any payment provider other than Midtrans

acceptanceCriteria.text: Customer can pay via Midtrans Snap using at least one card, VA, e-wallet, and QRIS method
Webhook handler rejects requests with an invalid Midtrans signature
A verified webhook updates the order's payment status correctly
Submitting the same order twice does not create duplicate charges
